accountWelcome.title: Congrats, {{username}}! 🎉
accountWelcome.subtitle: Your account is ready - here's what you can do now 👇
accountWelcome.f1: 🎉 Start a hangout and gather people right now
accountWelcome.f2: 📅 Organize an event in your city
accountWelcome.f3: 💬 Send a private message to anyone

slide1.title: Become local. Anywhere.
slide1.body: Hilads is the app that turns travelers into locals — and helps locals share what makes their city alive.

slide2.title: Three ways to live the city
slide2.itemChallenges: 🤝 Challenges — dare or be dared to discover hidden spots, taste real food, share culture, or help out.
slide2.itemHangouts: 🎉 Hangouts — casual meetups when you feel like it. Coffee, drinks, walks, whatever.
slide2.itemEvents: 📍 Local Events — bigger moments hosted by the community.

slide3.title: Earn your place in the city
slide3.body: Every challenge you complete, every meet you make, every spot you discover earns you points. Points reflect how local you've become in {{city}}. Reach the top of Most Local and earn your place among the people who make the city alive.

slide4.title: Ready to start your journey?
slide4.ctaChallenge: 📍 Take on your first challenge in {{city}}

slide1.title: Challenges turn trips into stories
slide1.body: Locals and travelers dare each other to share what makes a city real - food, places, culture, help. The reward? Meet up in person — or send proof from afar.

slide2.title: Launch your dare
slide2.body: Food, place, culture or help. Pick who it's for, how many spots, and how you'll wrap it - meet up or photo proof.

slide3.title: Someone takes it on
slide3.body: They send a request. You review it and accept - your private thread unlocks so you can chat and plan.

slide4.title: Meet or send proof
slide4.body: Meet up in person or send a photo from afar - your call. Either way, the pipeline tracks every step.

slide5.title: Wrap it up
slide5.body: After the meet-up (or once the photo lands), mark it accomplished. Your city, lived for real - one challenge at a time.

slide6.title: Beyond your city
slide6.body: Challenge anyone, anywhere. They send proof - a geotagged photo - and you validate from afar. Same photo flow works for local too. Local or global, every challenge counts.

slide7.title: Become the Most Local
slide7.body: Every challenge earns you points — in your city AND worldwide. Meet in person for a +50 bonus on top. Local or traveler, what matters is what you build here. Fresh boards every month.

connectionHint: Check your connection and try again.
